briefdescription.para: Invokes co_nmt_err() to handle Receive-PDO errors.
Invokes co_nmt_sync() to handle SYNC objects.
Invokes co_nmt_err() to handle SYNC errors.
Initializes a CANopen NMT service manager.

simplesect.para: srv on success, or NULL on error. In the latter case, the error code can be obtained with get_errc().

briefdescription.para: Finalizes a CANopen NMT service manager.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a CANopen NMT service manager.
the services to be enabled (any combination of CO_NMT_SRV_PDO, CO_NMT_SRV_SDO, CO_NMT_SRV_SYNC, CO_NMT_SRV_TIME and CO_NMT_SRV_EMCY). Services not part of set will be disabled.

briefdescription.para: This file is part of the CANopen library; it contains the implementation of the NMT service manager functions.

detaileddescription.para:
